# pfsense_group (Data Source)

Retrieves a single pfSense local [group](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/usermanager/groups.html) by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Group name. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, and underscores (max 16 characters).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the group.
- `gid` (String) Numeric group ID (auto-assigned).
- `members` (List of String) List of usernames that are members of this group.
- `privileges` (List of String) List of privilege names assigned to the group (e.g. 'page-all' for full admin access).
- `scope` (String) Group scope ('system' for built-in groups, 'local' for user-created).
